phrases.context: The Promenade du Soleil runs along the seafront with beaches below. Most are public — some sections are reserved for restaurants.

phrases.french: C'est une plage de galets, pas de sable ?
phrases.english: It's a pebble beach, not sand?
phrases.phonetic: say-ewn PLAHZH duh gah-LAY, pah duh SAH-bluh
phrases.context: Like most Riviera beaches, Menton's beaches are pebble (galets). Bring water shoes for comfort.

tips: Menton gets more sunshine than anywhere else in France — nearly 316 days per year
Bring water shoes — all beaches here are pebble, not sand
The view of the old town from the promenade, especially at golden hour, is one of the finest on the Riviera
